objective: Split experimental_named shader assets into behavior/responsibility subfolders while preserving catalog shaderAsset and pubspec declarations. Boundaries: coupled_orbits owns shaders whose c/z parameters co-evolve; rational_singularities owns rational/log-power pole-driven maps; transcendental_deformations owns sine/tangent/log-radial/hyperbolic deformations; discrete_attractors owns named 2D attractor map shaders; polynomial_variants owns polynomial/fold/scaled escape maps; root_finding owns iterative solver methods; physical_simulation owns physics-inspired simulation shaders. Each exposes only .frag assets and must not know Dart catalog/module wiring.
